new_threshold_interpretation.provisional_numeric_gate: throughput ratio ylong_over_libcurl >= 1.20 for the approved HTTPS proxy benchmark matrix with no protocol/TLS/proxy errors
new_threshold_interpretation.reason: The existing requirements still encode stricter award/SOTA thresholds and explicitly classify 20% as insufficient. The new threshold is a requirements-level change.

canonical_fair_matrix.reason: Geomean throughput is below 1.20 and the worst throughput cell is below 1.0.

best_retained_runtime_candidate.reason: The best retained runtime point is about 10.6% throughput geomean improvement, below a 20% threshold, and still has latency regressions.

s9h_io_home_stickiness_candidate.reason: One HTTP-over-HTTPS-proxy row exceeds 1.20, but the all-scenario geomean and HTTPS/mTLS rows fail, and the candidate was rejected and rolled back.

next_required_work: requirements.control.json must be revised/recompiled to encode the 20% SOTA threshold
pre-goal/runtime chain must be regenerated or reapproved so hashes and verifier agree with the new threshold
a current fair same-model libcurl benchmark must prove the 20% threshold under the revised matrix before S10/final Counterexample Gate can claim completion
